feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: one custom ui5 app from SAP BTP hits multiple s4hana on-premise client(100,200,200)
entry.content:
Dears,

I have one use case, I have created one custom ui5 using SAP BTP BAS and deployed to SAP BTP. Custom UI5 app uses destination service and cloud connector to consume OData from s4hana on premise system. In destination i have mentioned property client = 100 .

We have multiple clients in our on prem S/4 system.

Custom UI5 app(BTP) --> Client 100(on-prem S/4)

Custom UI5 app(BTP) --> Client 200(on-prem S/4)

Custom UI5 app(BTP) --> Client 300(on-prem S/4)

I want to run all 3 clients simultaneously from one custom ui5 app deployed to sap btp. is there any way to do?

entry.title: Different timeout for the same report in Fiori
entry.content:
Greetings!
In the Fiori Launchpad customized tile that launches a custom GUI report.
The report opens in a new tab and takes 40 minutes to run. The report is running successfully.
The user launches the same report in a new tab. But it doesn't finish and after 10 minutes goes back to the main screen Fiori Launchpad. What can explain this behavior of the Fiori application?

entry.title: Schedule job on Fiori
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

 

I like many reports on Fiori I for example Contract Expiry, off-contract spend.

pls see attached.

how can I schedule job on Fiori to run daily.

entry.title: Fetch List of Fiori apps from a given CDS view
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I have a scenario to find out the list of Fiori apps that uses a specific custom CDS view exposed as ODATA service

Is there any way that I can find the relevant Fiori applications by a given custom CDS name?

Any suggestion will be helpful here. Thanks in advance

Regards,

RM

entry.title: Prompted for username and password when running Fiori App on VSCODE localhost on my mac
entry.content:
I am developing the example Fiori Travel application, where we create a list report with object view.  This was developed correctly using eclipse and when executing the OData service preview there were no issues.  The next stage was to run on vscode locally, which I did, followed all the steps using the application generator.  The problem is when I run the application and it opens in localhost, I get the below error, asking for username and password.  I have many other local web servers using local host on python and nodejs wihtout issue.  The issue is I think it is was trying to authenticate from the btp abap backend where my OData service is kept.  I tried setting a username and password for the btp destination, but still no success.  I also tried changing the auths on my mac for the webapp folders and all sub folders, still no luck.

Please advise.

Best
Sulman

 

This is my ui5.yml file:

entry.title: FIORI Elements with ODATA V2: Side Effect not triggered
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have a FIORI Elements App with an ODATA V2 Model as Backend. What I would like to achieve:

If a User enters an Input in an Field in the Object Page, an Import Function is triggered to update another Field. 

The App is non-draft. But it is not getting triggered. 

I am referring to Side Effects - Documentation - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK

For my understanding: Do I have to press SAVE to trigger it? I want it to be displayed live directly after input. 

Code in BAS:

 

<Annotations Target="SAP.USER_ABC">
    <Annotation Term="com.sap.vocabularies.Common.v1.SideEffects" Qualifier="CalculatePrice">
        <Record>
            <PropertyValue Property="SourceProperties">
                <Collection>
                    <PropertyPath>CUSTOM_FIELD</PropertyPath>
                </Collection>
            </PropertyValue>
            <PropertyValue Property="TargetProperties">
                <Collection>
                    <String>CUSTOM_OUTPUT</String>
                </Collection>
            </PropertyValue>
            <PropertyValue Property="TriggerAction" String="XXX.PM_USER_SCEN_ASS_SRV.XXX_PM_USER_SCEN_ASS_SRV_Entities/CHECK"/>
        </Record>
    </Annotation>
</Annotations>

 

The Function Import is working on itself in the App.

entry.title: How to share data between a plug-in and the application?
entry.content:
We are running multiple apps and a plugin in Launchpad context. The plugin loads data from an odata service that can be used by the apps as well. Data loading takes quite a while...so i want to be able to provide data from the plugin to the apps - some kind of caching controlled by the plugin.

What is the proposed way to achieve this (ui5 version 1.96)?

There is an undocumented 'EventHub' which we are currently using to pass data from the plugin to the app. (EventHub.last)

Since it is undocumented i am not sure whether we should rely on that feature.

EventBus would be possible but the app might register itself after the plugin has loaded data and triggered the "data loaded"-event.

Data contains sensitive information which i do not want to put to storage.local.

entry.title: Maintain PIRs & Analyze PIR Quality FIORI apps showing wrong sales quantities.
entry.content:
I am trying to test the SAP standard FIORI apps

1. Maintain PIRs,

2. Analyze PIR Quality.

In this app we have sold qty and sale quantity. Does anyone know what is the backend logic for these two fields? I tried to check with backend table e.g. MATDOC, VBAP, LIPS but none of the figures matching with the FIORI app quantity.

MAN Material Requirements Planning SAP Fiori for SAP ERP MAN Production Planning (PP) #

entry.title: Change Display of Quantity Fields in specific language SAP Build Workzone
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to change the display of quantity fields in SAP Build Workzone for a specific language. For example, when you want to display a value of PC they will be displayed with decimal places like "1,000 PC" for one PC is available in Stock. In English language it will displayed "1 PC" without any decimal places. We also want the same display in every language.

Best regards,

Nico

entry.title: Fiori where to set default ADAPT FILTERs field
entry.content:
Hi Expert

 

every time I need to click ADAPT FILTERS and add new field. 

Is there any menu where I can set default ADAPT FILTERS field?

pls advise.

THanks in advanceabap

entry.title: Fiori set default view settings
entry.content:
Hi Expert;

 

To change layout of field display on screen on VIEW SETTINGS icon. how to set default for this?

pls advise.

entry.title: Fiori add APP Purchasing Requisition average approval time
entry.content:
Hi expert:

I would like to add APP "Purchasing Requisition average approval time" to my user.

But I cannot find in catalog.

Pls advise steps.

THanks in advance.

abap

entry.title: Show auto derived Quarter in OP from Input Key field on clicking CREATE button in LROP?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created a List Report Object Page app using CAP Fiori Elements application with CRUD functionality. Once I click on CREATE Button in List Report Page, a Popup with Key field Date appears where I enter a Date from value help and click continue which shows Object Page with multiple fields maintained in Facets. I have read only fields like Year, Month and Quarter which must be derived automatically from Date entered in popup in CAP Fiori Element LROP app.

Can anyone suggest me how to achieve the auto filled values into Year, Month & Quarter fields from Date key fields maintained in popup.

Thank you very much in advance.

Regards,

Ramana.

entry.title: Display Line Chart in ALP Visual Filter using String field Quarter(2024Q1) in SAP CAP CDS FE?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created a SAP CAP ALP Fiori Element app using CDS (NodeJS) with Visual Filters. I'm able to display Bar chart with length of Dimension must be 4 and above that chart is not showing the values. Also I have field Quarter with length 6 and format is 2024Q1/2024Q2 i.e. YYYYQ1/2/3/4. Also I have added annotation as Common.IsFiscalYearQuarter: true which will help to show Line Chart for String field also. But at present V4 Fiori Elements app is not supporting.

Can anyone help me to show Charts other than Bar chart as Visual Filters in SAP CAP CDS Fiori Element ALP app using NodeJS.

Thank you in advance.

Regards,

Ramana.

entry.title: Fiori data source how to view
entry.content:
HI Expert: 

Pls advise how to view the data in data source in Fiori pls?

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Data not updated in CDS view
entry.content:
Hi Expert: 

 

I have created 1 purchase requisition on t.code ME51n. 

But it 's not updated on this CDS view C_REQNAVGAPPROVALTIME.

my PR already approved!

Where to check for this?

 

Pls advise.

 

@Sandra_Rossi 

@veronika_skybova

entry.title: where to create new Relative DATE FUNCTION
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

I see this parameter in Fiori report.

How to create new Relative DATE FUNCTION pls? for example from 2020 until today.

CDS view is C_REQNAVGAPPROVALTIME

Pls advise

entry.title: Maintain PIRs fiori app/Upload of materials with 'N/A' version along with 'Yes' Version fails
entry.content:
Dear all, 

I am posting the present as I am trying to upload PIRs with the 'Maintain PIRs' fiori app simultaneously for materials with preexisting plan (and version active) along with several new materials which have never been planned in the past (this is indicated by N/A in the selection screen and by version inactive in the mass maintenance screen). The system fails to upload the PIRs from the point at which it encounters the first N/A material onwards but only for the 'Yes' materials. It manages to maintain the PIRs for the rest of the N/A materials. 

I was wondering if there was any direct solution or a proper way to maintain the excel file in order to successfully upload PIRs for all the materials of interest at the same time. Or at least is there a way to massively change the version to active (without uploading 2 separate files) before I upload my file?

I also attach a screenshot of the error I receive in case it helps.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Which course should i take to clear the fiori developer certification?
Error retrieving edmx for [destination] - Fiori Project in Eclipse to BAS (ABAP Cloud)
entry.content:
Hello.

I am trying the 'Create Fiori Project' functionality from the Service Binding (ABAP Cloud) in Eclipse. But when the Business Application Studio opens, I get the error:

"Error retrieving edmx for [s4h]. Unable to launch the Fiori generator from ADT. Check output logs [SAP Fiori Tools - Application Modeler] for more information."

What am I missing? My settings are as following.

Service Binding:

Eclipse external IDE configuration:

SAP Destination:

Error BAS:

SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP Business Application Studio
